passages.passage_text:
Directions (Q. Nos. 1-5) In these questions, relationship between different elements is shown in the statements. These statements are followed by two conclusions.
Give answer
(a) if only Conclusion I follows
(b) if only Conclusion II follows
(c) if either Conclusion I or II follows
(d) if neither Conclusion I nor II follows
(e) if both Conclusions I and II follow

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements L > M, M > N, N > P
Conclusions I. L > P     II. M > P

choices.c: if either Conclusion I or II follows
choices.d: if neither Conclusion I nor II follows
choices.e: if both Conclusions I and II follow

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements A > B, B = H, H > G
Conclusions I. A > G     II. A > H

choices.c: if either Conclusion I or II follows
choices.d: if neither Conclusion I nor II follows
choices.e: if both Conclusions I and II follow

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements H < J, F < H, I ≤ J = K
Conclusions I. H > I     II. I ≥ F

choices.c: if either Conclusion I or II follows
choices.d: if neither Conclusion I nor II follows
choices.e: if both Conclusions I and II follow

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements A < B < C ≤ D = E
Conclusions I. B ≤ E     II. B < E

choices.c: if either Conclusion I or II follows
choices.d: if neither Conclusion I nor II follows
choices.e: if both Conclusions I and II follow

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements P > M > Q, Q > Z > N
Conclusions I. M ≥ Z     II. N < P

choices.c: if either Conclusion I or II follows
choices.d: if neither Conclusion I nor II follows
choices.e: if both Conclusions I and II follow
